body:
## Implementation summary

Implemented scene-level collaboration panel for BIN-130 per the Founding Engineer plan (including all Rev-Steps 1–5).

**What changed:**
- `src/types/collaboration.ts` — thread, comment, decision type definitions
- `src/lib/relativeTime.ts` — shared relative-time formatter (Rev-Step 4)
- `src/lib/collaboration.ts` — full CRUD with localStorage persistence; `createThread` returns the new thread object
- `src/components/CollabPanel/` — 9 new files:
  - `CollabPanel.tsx/.module.css` — container with Inbox/Decision log toggle using correct ARIA `role="tablist"` + `aria-selected` (Rev-Step 3)
  - `CollabInboxToolbar.tsx` — unresolved count chip, status/assignee/scene filters, + New button
  - `CollabThreadRow.tsx/.module.css` — type chip, status chip, assignee, relative time, quick-status actions, Jump to scene
  - `CollabThreadDetail.tsx/.module.css` — comment timeline, assignee saves on blur only (Rev-Step 2), decision form for suggestion threads
  - `AddThreadModal.tsx/.module.css` — focus trap, Escape closes, first comment saved after `createThread` (Rev-Step 1)
  - `CollabBadge.tsx` — renders nothing when count = 0
- `src/app/story/[id]/page.tsx` — added Collab tab with ARIA tablist/tabpanel (Rev-Step 3), CollabBadge in tab label, CollabPanel mounted in sidebar
- `src/app/story/[id]/page.module.css` — sidebarTabWithBadge, sidebarPanelFull classes

**Rev-Steps addressed:**
- Rev-1 (Major): `firstComment` saved in `AddThreadModal.handleSubmit` after `createThread` returns
- Rev-2 (Minor): Assignee saved on `onBlur` in `CollabThreadDetail`
- Rev-3 (Minor): ARIA tab semantics fixed in sidebar tab bar and CollabPanel view toggle (no `aria-pressed` on tabs)
- Rev-4 (Nit): `relativeTime` extracted to `src/lib/relativeTime.ts`; imported in both `CollabThreadRow` and `CollabThreadDetail`
- Rev-5 (Nit): `applyFilters` defined outside `CollabPanel` component body (pure function)

## Branch
`ticket/BIN-130`

## Commits
- `085535b` Implement scene-level collaboration inbox (BIN-130)

## Test evidence
```
npm run build

Route (app)                                 Size  First Load JS
├ ƒ /story/[id]                          35.2 kB         137 kB

✓ Compiled successfully
✓ Generating static pages (6/6)
```
Build: PASS — no TypeScript errors, no lint warnings.

## Known limitations
- `getUnresolvedCount` is called on every render of `StoryPageInner`; for v1 localStorage scale this is fine
- Collaboration data is per-browser localStorage only (by design, v1 scope)

## Handoff

Assign to: Code Reviewer

## Recovery confirmed — BIN-130

Acknowledged recovery from BIN-128. Implementation plan is intact in issue description, including the REVISION section addressing Code Reviewer feedback (BIN-84).

- Plan: full `<plan>` block in description with Steps 1–11 + Rev-Steps 1–5
- Previous handoff comment already posted

Ready for Code Monkey.

Assign to: Code Monkey

## Plan revised — BIN-130 (addressing Code Reviewer feedback on BIN-84)

Revised implementation plan in issue description. Summary of changes:

- **Rev-Step 1 (Major):** Fix `firstComment` data loss in `AddThreadModal.tsx` — import `addComment`, call it after `createThread` if `firstComment.trim()` is non-empty
- **Rev-Step 2 (Minor):** Fix assignee saves on every keystroke in `CollabThreadDetail.tsx` — switch from `onChange → updateThread` to local state + `onBlur → updateThread`
- **Rev-Step 3 (Minor):** Fix ARIA tab semantics in 3 locations (`page.tsx` sidebar tab bar, `CollabPanel.tsx` inbox toggle) — replace `aria-pressed` with `role="tablist"` / `role="tab"` / `aria-selected` pattern; add `role="tabpanel"` to panel divs
- **Rev-Step 4 (Nit):** Extract `relativeTime` to `src/lib/relativeTime.ts`; remove duplicate from `CollabThreadRow.tsx` and `CollabThreadDetail.tsx`
- **Rev-Step 5 (Nit):** Move `applyFilters` outside `CollabPanel` component body to avoid re-creation on every render

Assign to: Code Monkey
Recovery ticket; previous BIN-128 stuck (checkout 409) and cancelled.
